title: Replication Data for: "Did Earth eat its leftovers? Impact ejecta as a component of the late veneer"

# Replication Data for: "Did Earth eat its leftovers? Impact ejecta as a component of the late veneer"

Authors: Carter, Philip
Published: 2022-04-08T14:45:09Z
Subjects: Astronomy and Astrophysics, Earth and Environmental Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/4NOILF

This dataset contains data from the article: Carter, P. J. and Stewart, S. T., 2021, "Did Earth eat its leftovers? Impact ejecta as a component of the late veneer", PSJ, in press. These data consist of N-body simulation input files, processed data, select simulation output and code to read input/output files. See the README file for further information

Citation: Carter, Philip, 2022, "Replication Data for: "Did Earth eat its leftovers? Impact ejecta as a component of the late veneer"", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/4NOILF, Harvard Dataverse, V1
